name: Weibo MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Weibo — China's dominant microblogging and social media platform. Enables AI agents to read Weibo posts, search content, retrieve user profiles, and monitor trending topics on Weibo — supporting social media monitoring and content analysis workflows for Chinese market teams.
use_cases: Monitoring Weibo trending topics from social listening agents
Searching Weibo content for brand mentions from marketing agents
Retrieving Weibo user profiles and posts from research agents
Analyzing Chinese social media sentiment from business intelligence agents
not_for: Non-Chinese social media monitoring (use Twitter/X, LinkedIn, Reddit MCPs)
Posting to Weibo (read-focused tool — verify write capabilities)
Teams without Weibo API access (requires Weibo developer account)
best_when: A business team monitoring the Chinese market wants AI agents to track Weibo trends, search brand mentions, or analyze Chinese social media content.
avoid_when: You target non-Chinese markets. Weibo is specifically for the Chinese market — CN data residency and API access restrictions apply.

auth.notes: Weibo developer API access required. OAuth 2.0 for user-level access. Weibo developer account registration needed.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Weibo API has free tier with rate limits; developer account required
pricing.paid_tiers: Weibo API commercial tiers for higher rate limits
pricing.notes: Weibo API requires developer registration. MCP server is free open source community tool.

performance.rate_limits: Weibo API rate limits apply; free tier is restrictive

known_agent_gotchas: Weibo API is CN-only — data residency in China, access may be restricted from non-CN IPs
Weibo API registration is only available to Chinese entities — international access is limited
Community tool — not official Weibo SDK, may lag behind API changes
Rate limits on free tier are restrictive — agents may hit limits quickly with active monitoring
agent_readiness.security_notes: CN data residency. Weibo API OAuth credentials. Social media data — handle user privacy per applicable laws. Non-CN API access may violate Weibo ToS.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency. OAuth credentials. HTTPS. Weibo API may restrict non-CN access.
